qa_pairs.question: How do you log a metric in Python using `wandb`?
qa_pairs.answer: You can log a metric using `wandb.log({'metric_name': value})`, for example, `wandb.log({'my_metric': my_metric})`.

qa_pairs.question: What folder is created after a training run in `wandb` offline mode?
qa_pairs.answer: After a training run in offline mode, a new folder named `./wandb/offline-run*` will be created.

qa_pairs.question: How can metrics be sent to the server after an offline `wandb` training run?
qa_pairs.answer: Metrics can be sent to the server using the command `wandb sync ./wandb/offline-run*`.

qa_pairs.question: What is the function of the asterisk (`*`) when used with the `wandb sync` command?
qa_pairs.answer: The asterisk (`*`) in `wandb sync ./wandb/offline-run*` indicates that all runs will be synced to the server.
